Office Assistant & Bookkeeper • Track and record deposited checks and sale transaction revenue using the POS system and business’ financial banking account. • Provide monthly billing invoices for clientele personal expenses. • Handle cash personal/business checks, send and receive money for customers, such as through MoneyGram. • Calculate and document payroll taxes, wages, and prepare registration reports using Quickbooks and 21st Century Accounting. • Receive and answer calls from customers requiring assistance for various business-related inquiries and issues.
